initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS proportion
FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS proportion
FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE bond_type = 'single';

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') * 100.0) / 
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'), 
        5
    ) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;
